_style: 儿童 App UI 素材, painterly children book illustration, 温暖配色（赭石、琥珀、柔和粉橙）, 柔和阴影, ⚠️纯白色背景 pure white background, 居中构图, 完整剧情场景, 横向构图（4:3），无任何文字

sentences.subject: a cheerful girl piglet character standing alone center frame pointing to herself with one hand on chest, smiling at viewer, simple introduction pose

sentences.text: This is my little brother George.
sentences.subject: a girl piglet on the left gesturing toward a smaller boy piglet on the right who holds a green dinosaur toy, family introduction pose
a wide view of a hill with a small house, grey clouds above with blue raindrops falling everywhere, two small piglets visible inside through the window

sentences.text: Peppa and George cannot play outside.
sentences.subject: two piglets standing inside a house looking out a window at heavy rain, sad expressions, a red prohibition sign in upper corner

sentences.text: Daddy, it stopped raining, can we go out to play?
sentences.meaning_zh: 爸爸，雨停了，我们能出去玩吗？
sentences.subject: a girl piglet with hopeful pleading eyes looking up at a father pig, behind them a window showing the rain has stopped and sunlight breaking through clouds

sentences.text: All right, run along you two.
sentences.subject: a smiling father pig giving a thumbs up while two small piglets are already running off into a sunny garden, motion lines behind the piglets

sentences.text: Peppa loves jumping in muddy puddles.
sentences.subject: a girl piglet mid-jump above a big brown muddy puddle with a huge red heart floating above her head, brown water splashes flying outward, pure joy on her face

sentences.text: If you jump in muddy puddles, you must wear your boots.
sentences.meaning_zh: 如果你要在泥水洼里跳，你必须穿上雨靴。
sentences.subject: a mother pig with index finger raised in instructional pose pointing to a pair of yellow rain boots on the floor, a girl piglet listening attentively, a small puddle nearby

sentences.text: Peppa likes to look after her little brother George.
sentences.subject: a girl piglet holding the hand of a smaller boy piglet protectively as they walk together through grass, the older sister looking down at the younger with care, a small heart between them

sentences.text: Stop George, I must check if it's safe.
sentences.meaning_zh: 停下George，我得先检查安不安全。
sentences.subject: a girl piglet with one palm raised in a stop gesture holding back a smaller boy piglet, in front of them a large brown puddle, the girl piglet holding a magnifying glass examining the puddle carefully
a girl piglet with apologetic expression and one hand reaching out to a sad smaller boy piglet who is sitting in a small brown mud puddle, a thought bubble with mud (no danger)

sentences.text: Come on George, let's go show daddy.
sentences.meaning_zh: 走吧George，咱们去给爸爸看看。
sentences.subject: a girl piglet beckoning a boy piglet to follow her, both completely covered in brown mud splatters, walking toward a house in the distance, excitement in their poses

sentences.text: Daddy daddy, guess what we've been doing!
sentences.meaning_zh: 爸爸爸爸，你猜我们刚才在干嘛！
sentences.subject: two muddy piglets bouncing excitedly in front of a startled father pig, hands raised gleefully, a giant question mark floating between them
a father pig with one hand on chin in thinking pose, looking at two muddy piglets, a thought bubble showing a vintage television set above his head

sentences.text: Oh, look at the mess you're in!
sentences.meaning_zh: 哎呀，看看你们身上多脏！
sentences.subject: a mother pig with hands on cheeks in shock, eyes wide, looking at three muddy figures (two piglets and a daddy pig) all dripping with brown mud, exclamation marks around her head

sentences.text: Let's clean up quickly before mommy sees the mess.
sentences.meaning_zh: 趁妈妈还没看见，咱们赶紧打扫干净。
sentences.subject: a father pig and two piglets frantically mopping a muddy floor together with yellow mops and buckets, sparkle effects of cleaning, an hourglass in the corner indicating time pressure, a closed door in background
